items_published.title: OpenAI Codex Record & Replay Ships for macOS
key_claims: Ships in macOS Codex v26.616 on 2026-06-18
Available to Plus/Pro/Business/Enterprise/Edu outside EEA, UK, Switzerland
Generates natural-language skill description, not mechanical click log
Works with Computer Use, browser actions, plugins

items_published.title: Cursor 3.8 Ships Automations with Slack and GitHub Triggers
key_claims: /automate skill: natural language → configured automation
Slack emoji trigger ships in 3.8
Five new GitHub triggers: issue comment, PR review comment, PR review submitted, review thread updated, workflow run completed
Computer Use enabled by default in cloud agents
caveats: Cloud agent billing details not fully documented in public docs at launch
SpaceX $60B acquisition of Cursor pending; expected Q3 2026 close

items_published.title: Anthropic Ships Enterprise-Managed MCP Auth via Okta
key_claims: Okta is first supported identity provider
Seven connectors at EMA launch: Asana, Atlassian, Canva, Figma, Granola, Linear, Supabase
Beta for Claude Team and Enterprise plans
Works in VS Code clients
Ramp: 2,000 employees provisioned zero-touch (vendor-cited customer stat)
caveats: Beta only; GA timeline not announced
Ramp stat is vendor-cited; not independently verified

items_published.title: Claude Code v2.1.186 Adds CLI MCP Auth and Bash Auto-Response
key_claims: claude mcp login/logout CLI commands added in v2.1.186
respondToBashCommands configuration option ships
Release date: 2026-06-22

items_published.title: OpenAI Adds Credit Analytics and Spend Controls to ChatGPT Enterprise
items_published.notes: Primary URL returned HTTP 403 from sandbox; confirmed via multiple T3 secondaries
key_claims: Credit consumption dashboard: breakdown by user, product, model
Weekly rolling limits with alert or hard-cap enforcement
Group-level caps and individual user overrides

items_published.title: European Commission Selects EUROPA Consortium for Sovereign Frontier AI Model
key_claims: EUROPA consortium led by Domyn (Italy), selected 2026-06-19
400B+ parameter open-source model, all 24 EU official languages
Up to 2.5% of EuroHPC total capacity for one year
6,000-chip NVIDIA Blackwell cluster: secondary sources only, not confirmed in EC primary
caveats: Hardware commitment figure not confirmed from EC primary; secondary sources only

items_published.title: FERC Orders Six Grid Operators to Reform AI Data Center Connection Rules
items_published.notes: Primary URL returned HTTP 403 from sandbox; all details confirmed from multiple independent secondaries
key_claims: Section 206 orders to PJM, MISO, SPP, CAISO, ISO-NE, NYISO on 2026-06-18
60-day deadline to justify or reform large-load tariffs
30-day deadline for power supply adequacy reports
Five reform categories: transmission process, cost allocation, co-location, flexible services, generation study
